items.definition_en: Brunch time is the period between breakfast and lunch.
items.example_en: We always meet during brunch time on Sundays.

items.definition_en: Early morning is the period just after the sun rises.
items.example_en: She likes to go for a run in the early morning.

items.definition_en: Late afternoon is the time before evening begins.
items.example_en: He usually finishes work in the late afternoon.

items.definition_en: Mid-morning is the middle part of the morning.
items.example_en: She takes a short walk in the mid-morning.

items.definition_en: Midday is the middle of the day, around twelve o'clock.
items.example_en: We have lunch at midday.

items.definition_en: Noon is twelve o'clock in the day.
items.example_en: The meeting starts at noon.

items.definition_en: Early evening is the beginning of the evening.
items.example_en: It gets dark in the early evening during winter.

items.definition_en: Late night is the period after most people go to bed.
items.example_en: He likes to read in the late night.

items.definition_en: A midnight snack is food eaten late at night.
items.example_en: She sometimes has a midnight snack if she feels hungry.

items.definition_en: Study time is the period when you do your school work.
items.example_en: Every day, he has study time after dinner.

items.definition_en: Bath time is when someone has a bath.
items.example_en: Bath time is her favorite part of the day.

items.definition_en: Playtime is the time set for playing.
items.example_en: Kids enjoy playtime at school.

items.definition_en: Nap time is when someone takes a short sleep.
items.example_en: Babies usually have nap time in the afternoon.

items.definition_en: Mealtime is the period when meals are eaten.
items.example_en: They like to talk together at mealtime.

items.definition_en: Dinnertime is the time to eat dinner.
items.example_en: Dinnertime is usually at six o'clock in my house.

items.definition_en: Reading time is the period for reading books.
items.example_en: The teacher gives us reading time each day.

items.definition_en: Quiet time is when you are calm and silent.
items.example_en: I like to have some quiet time before bed.

items.definition_en: Family time is a period spent with family members.
items.example_en: We play games during family time in the evenings.

items.definition_en: Supper time is when you eat a light evening meal.
items.example_en: Supper time is at seven in our home.

items.definition_en: Wake-up time is when someone gets up in the morning.
items.example_en: My wake-up time is seven o’clock on weekdays.
